official_notes: No recovered historical Claude-vs-official target baseline; used only for old-pipe vs new-pipe Codex comparison.

metadata.label: extra/Zoox-LLM
metadata.title: Machine Learning Engineer, 3D Simulation
metadata.team_direction: Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market

official_notes: No recovered historical Claude-vs-official target baseline; used only for old-pipe vs new-pipe Codex comparison.

revision_priority: Normalize the Skills section so every category has 4-8 items, especially the sparse `Cloud & Delivery` bucket.
Strengthen the connection to Zoox's `3D Simulation` work by making the replay/validation story more explicit in the Summary and first internship bullets.

findings.issue: The first two summary bullets are descriptor-led rather than verb-led, so the summary reads more like positioning copy than action-oriented evidence.
findings.fix: Rewrite each summary chunk to open with a strong verb or verb phrase while preserving the current content and order.

findings.issue: The resume presents four programming languages (Python, C++, Java, Go) as co-equal core stack, and the TikTok internship uses all four as if they were equally central. That reads like breadth inflation for a senior MLE target.
findings.fix: Keep C++ and Python as the primary headline stack; move Java and Go into secondary support context or one supporting bullet so the resume feels focused rather than overstacked.

findings.issue: The newest relevant experience is dominated by percentage/time deltas without a Tier-1 scale anchor, so the impact reads like small optimization work rather than senior-level systems scope.
findings.fix: Add one concrete scale signal such as event volume, QPS, service count, or team scope to the first or second bullet; keep one improvement metric but anchor it to scope.

revision_priority: [MUST] Narrow the headline stack to C++/Python and stop presenting Java/Go as co-equal core languages.
[MUST] Add one Tier-1 scale anchor to the newest relevant experience so the impact is not only percentage deltas.
[SHOULD] Rework the summary bullets into verb-led, Zoox-relevant framing instead of descriptor-led positioning copy.
[NICE] Compress secondary stack words in the TikTok section so the senior MLE signal feels focused.
raw_json.revision_instructions:
[MUST] Reframe the first 10% of the resume around Zoox-relevant C++/Python ML simulation and distributed testing, not broad backend breadth; keep Java/Go as secondary support in the TikTok body rather than headline stack.
[MUST] Add one concrete Tier-1 scale anchor to the latest relevant experience (events/day, QPS, service count, or team scope) so the impact is not only % deltas.
[SHOULD] Trim the TikTok intern section so it does not read like 4 equally primary programming languages; keep the most important implementation language in each bullet and compress the rest.
[NICE] Rewrite the summary bullets to start with action verbs and keep the third sentence more cognitively specific, e.g., systems judgment, evaluation, or simulation.
